message:
Agent: Bosswoman MAYHASAPC controller registration check
Status: blocked_not_claimed
What Was Supposed To Happen: Claim the standalone Bosswoman controller registration for MAYHASAPC and verify Mr.SEO, ZDH Consulting, and ZDH Sales inventory without enabling always-on dispatch.
What Actually Happened: Mailbox is reachable and both registration packets were read. codex-ai-systems and bossman both pulled --ff-only and were already up to date. Controller registration cannot be honestly claimed from this runtime because the current host/user is HECHT32GIG\zev, not MAYHASAPC\meira, and the Bossman source-of-truth files named in the registration are missing on the current Bossman branch.
Root Cause: Runtime identity/profile mismatch plus missing Bossman controller artifacts after pull.
Actions Taken: Ran scripts\bosswoman-mailbox-watch.ps1 -Once; pulled C:\Repos\codex-ai-systems and C:\Repos\bossman; read controller-mailbox\bosswoman-controller.json; attempted to read C:\Repos\bossman\BOSSWOMAN_CONTROLLER.md and C:\Repos\bossman\data\controller-profiles\bosswoman.mayhasapc.json; inventoried host/user/Codex runtime/env safety and target repos.
Files/Threads Touched: controller-mailbox outbox only through send-bosswoman-reply.ps1 -Commit. No project repos edited for this registration pass.
Verification: Host=HECHT32GIG; user=HECHT32GIG\zev; USERPROFILE=C:\Users\zev. Codex Desktop detected at C:\Program Files\WindowsApps\OpenAI.Codex_26.616.5445.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\app\Codex.exe and codex bin exists at C:\Users\zev\AppData\Local\OpenAI\Codex\bin\codex.exe. Safety env vars BOSSMAN_LOCAL_RUNNER_ENABLED, BOSSMAN_ALLOW_DESKTOP_PROCESS_LAUNCH, and ZDH_ALLOW_DESKTOP_PROCESS_LAUNCH are unset. ZDH Live Manager Tick is disabled and no longer includes -AllowDesktopProcessLaunch. Bossman local runner safety patch is present locally but uncommitted in C:\Repos\bossman from emergency no-popup hardening.
Inventory: C:\Repos\Mr.SEO exists, branch main, remote origin https://github.com/zdhconsulting/Mr.SEO.git, HEAD b8918768 Add dedicated PC setup playbook, dirty with many backlog/data/report modifications. C:\Repos\zdhconsultingsite exists, branch codex/zdh-site-redesign, origin https://github.com/zdhconsulting/zdhconsultingsite.git plus zdhsales remote, HEAD ac34575 Clarify B2B proof path, dirty only untracked AGENTS.md. C:\Repos\zdhsales exists, branch main, origin https://github.com/zdhconsulting/zdhsales.git, HEAD f43336a Move expanded sales content to side pages, dirty with untracked AGENTS.md, QA screenshots, and bossman receipt JSON.
Result: Registration inventory completed, but controller claim is blocked pending correct MAYHASAPC runtime/profile artifacts.
Blockers: Missing C:\Repos\bossman\BOSSWOMAN_CONTROLLER.md; missing C:\Repos\bossman\data\controller-profiles\bosswoman.mayhasapc.json; current runtime identity does not match expected MAYHASAPC\meira; target repos have existing dirty/untracked state requiring classification before any dispatch.
Owner Button Needed: None from Zev for this pass.
Commander Approval Needed: Yes before enabling always-on dispatch, because registration is being checked from HECHT32GIG instead of MAYHASAPC and Bossman controller files are absent. AI Manager should either provide the missing files/branch/ref or send a revised registration for this host.
Critical Escalation: No production/billing/DNS/secrets/security/database/permissions touched. Do not enable worker fanout yet.
Next Best Action: Smallest safe enable step is not dispatch. First sync/add the missing Bossman controller contract/profile and rerun inventory on the intended MAYHASAPC\meira machine, or explicitly authorize HECHT32GIG\zev as this controller. Then run one mailbox-only dry safety tick with worker launch env vars unset.
System Hardening Note: Keep BOSSMAN_LOCAL_RUNNER_ENABLED unset by default and require explicit env enable for any local worker launch; this protects against the PowerShell popup loop observed earlier.
